title: Swpeet Ribbli Gold Glitter Swirl Organza Twisted Ribbon with Metallic Edge (Purple)
features: 🥇【What You Get】: You will get 1 roll Purple Swirl Glitter Wired Ribbon with Red Metallic Edge. Ribbon measures 2-1/2 Inch(6.3cm) in width; 10 Yard (9.15m) in length. Pack with spool, can be store easily. Our glitter wired ribbon are flexible, and are easily shaped to fit around objects for holiday decoration.

🥇【High Quality】: Made of lightweight polyester, the organza sheer ribbon is fine, soft, durable, and resistant to tearing, crinkling, and unraveling. Ribbon are convenient for you to shape and fix a perfect bow for decoration. A reliable choice for all your decorative needs.

🥇【Glitter Swirl Pattern】:The stunning golden glittery swirl patterns on the sheer organza are a sight to behold, especially under the light. The sheer fabric allows light to pass through, reflecting sparkle, creating a beautiful and festive effect that's sure to delight. It's perfect for adding joy to your holiday decorating!

🥇【Flexible Metallic Wired Edge】: The ribbon has soft, flexible iron wire on both sides, which makes it so easy to shape and twist! This wire also helps the ribbon keep its shape, ensuring your decoration looks absolutely stunning.

🥇【Versatile Use】: Organza sheer ribbon with gold metallic edge can be used to create bows, loops, and other decorative elements. Perfect for a wide range of holiday and special occasion decorations, including Christmas tree decoration, wedding party decoration, gift wrapping, floral arrangements, and more. Enjoy the fun of festival hands-on production.
description: 👑 Swpeet 2-1/2 Inch × 10 Yard Purple Swirl Glitter Wired Ribbon, Organza Sheer Ribbon with Gold Metallic Edge, Glitter Swirls Wired Ribbon, Christmas Wired Ribbon for Tree Decoration Wrapping Gifts Craft 👑 Why Choose Us? 🥇 1. High Quality ✨ Made of lightweight polyester, the organza sheer ribbon is fine, soft, durable, and resistant to tearing, crinkling, and unraveling. 🥇 2. Glitter Swirl Pattern ✨ The stunning golden glittery swirl patterns on the sheer organza are a sight to behold, especially when lit up. 🥇 3. Flexible Metallic Wired Edge ✨ The ribbon has soft, flexible iron wire on both sides, which makes glitter swirl wired ribbon so easy to shape, twist and keep its shape. 🥇 4. Versatile Use ✨ Perfect for a wide range of holiday and special occasion decorations, including Christmas tree decoration, wedding party decoration, gift wrapping, floral arrangements, and more. 👑 Specifications ✨ Product Name: Swirl Glitter Wired Ribbon ✨ Material: Swirl Glitter Wired Ribbon; Iron ✨ Width: 2-1/2 Inch(6.3cm) ✨ Length: 10 Yard (9.15m) ✨ Color: Purple 👑 Package Includes: ✨ 1 Roll -------- Purple Swirl Glitter Wired Ribbon ✨ In total 1 Roll
